mapper.select: SELECT sql from qry_head where id = #{id}
SELECT * from qry_dictionary where id = #{id} and opcode = #{account} order by col_index
SELECT * from qry_dictionary where id = #{id} and opcode = #{account} and col_name = #{field}
SELECT count(*) from qry_dictionary where id = #{id} and opcode = #{account}
mapper.delete: delete from qry_dictionary where id = #{id} and opcode = #{account}
mapper.insert: insert into qry_dictionary (id, col_name, width, label, format, visible, alignment, col_index, editable, sortable, footerformat, opcode, in_table_alias) values (#{id},#{dynamicColumn.field},#{dynamicColumn.width},#{dynamicColumn.title}, #{dynamicColumn.formatter}, #{dynamicColumn.visible}, #{dynamicColumn.align}, #{dynamicColumn.index}, #{dynamicColumn.editable}, #{dynamicColumn.sortable}, #{dynamicColumn.footerFormatter}, #{account}, #{dynamicColumn.tableAlias})
mapper.select: SELECT message from errormsg where code = #{code}
